hero.headline: The litter box that cleans itself.
hero.body: Meet Pura Max 2, a self-cleaning cat litter box designed for a calmer home and a cleaner daily routine.

features.heading: Designed around cleaner routines.
features.body: Every detail of Pura Max 2 is built to reduce daily scooping while keeping the litter routine safer, quieter, and easier to follow.

App-connected routine logs.title: App-connected routine logs
App-connected routine logs.body: Usage and device status can be framed as routine visibility, not medical diagnosis.

Automatic cleaning cycle.title: Automatic cleaning cycle
Automatic cleaning cycle.body: Designed to separate waste after use and reduce the need for daily scooping.

Low-entry enclosed design.title: Low-entry enclosed design
Low-entry enclosed design.body: A 200 mm entry height helps position the product for cats that need easier access than taller enclosed boxes.

Odor-control accessories.title: Odor-control accessories
Odor-control accessories.body: The sealed waste bin, K3 smart spray, and N50 2.0 deodorizer support a cleaner indoor setup without promising zero odor.

Quiet daily operation.title: Quiet daily operation
Quiet daily operation.body: The 35 dB operating claim supports a calmer litter routine for compact indoor homes.

Safety sensor system.title: Safety sensor system
Safety sensor system.body: Sensor-based protection helps keep cleaning routines controlled around daily cat use.

specs.heading: Technical at a glance
specs.body: Production-ready hardware specs for the Pura Max 2 (P9902).
